description: shipyard-cp Birdeye Hot List - Primary nodes for immediate reference

hot_nodes.title: Project Overview
hot_nodes.summary: Entry point for shipyard-cp. Contains setup instructions, implementation status, API endpoints, and documentation links.

hot_nodes.title: Implementation Runbook
hot_nodes.summary: Primary operational guide. Defines implementation steps, progress tracking, dependency verification, and next steps.

hot_nodes.title: Requirements Definition
hot_nodes.summary: Authoritative requirements for AI worker control plane. Defines LiteLLM integration, worker abstraction, publish gates, and acceptance criteria.

hot_nodes.title: State Machine Specification
hot_nodes.summary: Defines 16 states, transition rules, guard conditions, and event structure. Essential for understanding task lifecycle.

hot_nodes.title: API Contract
hot_nodes.summary: Defines all API endpoints, request/response formats, and validation rules. Source of truth for API implementation.

hot_nodes.title: Birdeye Knowledge Map
hot_nodes.summary: Node listings and edges for documentation navigation. Use to discover document relationships and dependencies.
